message: New email from Mercury: Emilio sent $250.00 to Virgil Law LLP via ACH Payment

metadata.subject: Emilio sent $250.00 to Virgil Law LLP via ACH Payment
metadata.preview:
Emilio sent an ACH Payment of $250.00 to Virgil Law LLP.

Hi Elio,
Emilio sent an ACH Payment of $250.00 to Virgil Law LLP. The money was sent from Audiogen Inc’s Mercury checking account ••3885.
